description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image with a global before_script that runs `apt-get update` and `apt-get -y install graphviz`. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add three jobs—`build:epub` (allow_failure, runs only on master, executes `./gradlew -PsiteHost=https://groovy-lang.gitlab.io asciidoctorEpub` and stores `build/docs/asciidocEpub` as an artifact), `build:html` (runs only on master, executes `./gradlew -PsiteHost=https://groovy-lang.gitlab.io bake` and stores `build/jbake` as an artifact), and `build:pdf` (allow_failure, runs only on master, executes `./gradlew -PsiteHost=https://groovy-lang.gitlab.io asciidoctorPdf` and stores `build/docs/asciidocPdf` as an artifact). In the deploy stage add a `pages` job that runs only on master, is manual, depends on the three build jobs, runs `mkdir public`, then copies HTML from `build/jbake`, EPUB from `build/docs/asciidocPdf`, and PDF from `build/docs/asciidocPdf` into the `public` directory, and publishes the `public` folder as a GitLab Pages artifact.
